data.title: OpenAI Board Unanimously Rejects Elon Musk's $97 Billion Acquisition Proposal Days After Sam Altman Calls It A Move To 'Slow Down' A Competitor
data.description: OpenAI on Friday turned down a substantial offer from Elon Musk and his consortium of investors to acquire the company's assets.

data.title: Billionaire Investor Dan Loeb Boosts Stake In Mark Zuckerberg's Meta, Elon Musk's Tesla, But Sold These Three Mag 7 Stocks In Q4
data.description: Activist investor Dan Loeb‘s Third Point LLC has significantly ramped up its stakes in Flutter Entertainment, Elon Musk's Tesla, and Mark Zuckerberg's Meta Platforms during the final quarter of 2024.
